texto: She let her mind drift, thinking about new lingerie designs, wishing she'd brought along her sketchpad. Inspiration could strike at the most inconvenient times--in the shower, in the car, on this road--but she was grateful it was with her again, an old companion with whom she was getting reacquainted, pleased to find they could take up where they'd left off, as if there'd been no estrangement at all.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Heather Barbieri: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “She let her mind drift, thinking about new lingerie designs, wishing she'd brought along her sket…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, fashion, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e viagem.
